plugins.publishCmd: zarf package create . --set VERSION=${nextRelease.version} --architecture amd64 --confirm && zarf package create . --set VERSION=${nextRelease.version} --architecture arm64 --confirm && zarf package publish zarf-package-uds-prereq-services-amd64-${nextRelease.version}.tar.zst oci://ghcr.io/sam-delap --confirm && zarf package publish zarf-package-uds-prereq-services-arm64-${nextRelease.version}.tar.zst oci://ghcr.io/sam-delap --confirm
